mapper.sql: id, username, ip, location, browser, os, status, msg, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_login_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_login_log WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND created_time >= CAST(#{startTime} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND created_time < CAST(#{endTime} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 day'
